items.title: Sony FX5 Special with Philip Bloom | A24 Defends Its $75M Google DeepMind Deal | EBU’s Women’s Athletics Camera Guidelines – Focus Check ep126
items.summary: The Sony FX5 is here – and this week’s episode is largely dedicated to it. Nino is joined live from Tokyo by Johnnie and by special guest Philip Bloom from London, both of whom spent a week shooting w…

items.title: Rare Arctic Bobtail Squid Filmed in Its Natural Habitat for the First Time
items.summary: Scientists have filmed the Arctic bobtail squid in its natural subzero habitat for the first time, including the rare discovery of a mature female tending to its eggs. [Read More]

items.title: Kylie Jenner’s Meta Smart Glasses Parodied in Guerrilla Lenticular Ad
items.summary: An activist group has created a spoof billboard ad on a London bus stop, taking aim at Meta's AI smart glasses. [Read More]

items.title: Tourist Filmed Taking Selfies Inches From Enormous Wild Bison
items.summary: A tourist was filmed taking selfies dangerously close to a huge wild bison in a national park -- just weeks after a photographer captured a man being hurled eight feet into the air by one. [Read More]
